_comment: Copy this file, fill in next week's content, then run: python3 tools/build_week.py path/to/your-copy.json --archive-note '...'. Read program/PUBLISHING.md for the full runbook.
weekNoteHtml:
How to use this page. Three movement patterns per competition event. Pick the events you want to train, then do all three patterns for that event — or cherry-pick across events. Aim for 4–6 patterns total per session. Warm up first; stop a set short if form breaks down.

Tap any movement's teal header to open it full-screen — easy to read on the gym iPad, pinch to zoom, scroll through all three exercises.

This week. Hypertrophy Week 2. Same movements as last week so we can add a rep, a set, or a small load bump. Stay controlled on the eccentric. Stop a set when form breaks.
testsLineHtml: Working number week. No formal test — tap your name below anytime to log a working number you want to track.

patterns.name: Tempo Box Squat
patterns.rx: 4 × 12–15 reps · rest 90 sec between · 3-sec descent + 1-sec pause on the box
patterns.load: Your competition KB (or one size up if 15 is easy)
cues: Lower over a slow 3-count, sit on the box for a full second, then stand.
Add 1 rep per set or 1 KB size if last week's top set was clean.
KB tight to the chest, elbows tucked, heels down.
Last 2–3 reps of each set should be hard. Stop if your chest dumps forward.

patterns.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
patterns.rx: 3 × 10–12 reps each leg · rest 60 sec between sets
patterns.load: A DB in each hand, or one KB held at the chest
cues: Back foot up on a bench, front foot a stride forward.
Drop straight down — front knee tracks over the toes, back knee toward the floor.
Drive through the front heel to stand. All the work stays on the front leg.
Add 5 lb to each DB if last week's top set was easy.

patterns.name: Heels-Elevated Goblet Squat
patterns.load: A moderate KB or DB held at the chest
cues: Heels up on a small plate or wedge.
Sit straight down between your knees, chest tall.
Full depth, controlled tempo, no bouncing at the bottom.
Keep the KB tight to your chest the whole set.

patterns.name: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
patterns.load: Loaded barbell, or a DB/KB in each hand — moderate

patterns.name: Single-Arm DB Row
patterns.rx: 3 × 12 reps each side · rest 60 sec between sets

patterns.name: Bench Volume @ % of Max Reps
patterns.rx: 3 × @ 60% of your max-rep bench test · rest 90 sec
cues: The app shows your personal rep target. Hit it clean across all 3 sets.

patterns.name: Fat-Grip Hang
patterns.load: Fat-grip attachments at ~80% of your best

patterns.name: Loaded Calf Raises
patterns.load: Hold a DB in each hand

patterns.name: Box Jump · Step Down
patterns.load: Moderate box, step down each time

patterns.name: Comp-Distance Sled Push
patterns.load: Competition load: 2×25 lb plates (women) / 2×45 lb plates (men)

patterns.name: Heavy 25 yd
patterns.load: Add 25 lb per side over comp load

patterns.name: Fast & Light
patterns.load: Drop one plate per side · max speed
